hero.title: QJudge - Programming Assessment Platform
hero.subtitle: Real-time evaluation, anti-cheat exam mode, and AI teaching assistant to streamline teaching and learning.

judge.title: Great Testing Experience
judge.description: Get instant feedback on test cases, execution time, and memory usage after submission, with clear debugging context.

antiCheat.title: Anti-Cheat System
antiCheat.description: Exam mode supports violation logging, state locking, and admin tracking to maintain a fair assessment process.

ai.title: AI Teaching Assistant
ai.description: Help teachers organize problem statements, generate drafts, and create educational content faster with consistent quality.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Python, C++, Java, JavaScript and more with syntax highlighting and autocomplete.

analytics.title: Realtime analytics
analytics.description: Detailed results with runtime and memory insights to help you optimize.

contest.title: Contest ready
contest.description: Host contests with live rankings and flexible scoring rules.

lab.title: Lab mode
lab.description: Teachers manage sets and track class progress with ease.

miniJudge.title: Try QJudge in one flow: Problem, Code, Submit, Results

problem.title: Nth Fibonacci Number
problem.description: Given an integer n, return the nth Fibonacci number where F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.

browse.title: Browse problems
browse.description: Filter by difficulty and tags; review statements and samples.

code.title: Write code
code.description: Use the built-in editor with Markdown guidance and hints.

submit.title: Submit & test
submit.description: One-click submission with instant results and detailed report.

improve.title: Keep improving
improve.description: Discuss, compare solutions, and join contests or labs.

highlights.title: Designed for teaching and competition
highlights.item5: Modern UI built on IBM Carbon

testimonials.title: What students say
testimonials.quote1: Realtime feedback helps me spot issues faster than traditional assignments!
testimonials.quote2: The diff view makes debugging easier. The interface is intuitive.
testimonials.quote3: Lab mode aligns perfectly with our course flow and discussions.

contact.title: Questions or ideas?
contact.description: We welcome feedback, bug reports, and collaboration proposals.
